mapper.insert:
insert into lightweight_knowledge_base_enhanced_qa
question, answer,
crop_id,
pest_id,
#{question}, #{answer},
#{cropId},
#{pestId},
mapper.update:
update lightweight_knowledge_base_enhanced_qa
question = #{question}, answer = #{answer},
crop_id = #{cropId},
pest_id = #{pestId},
where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: select id, crop_id as cropId, pest_id as pestId, question, answer, delete_flag as deleteFlag, gmt_create as gmtCreate, gmt_modified as gmtModified from lightweight_knowledge_base_enhanced_qa where id = #{id}
